center.name: Swan Coastal Plain
center.summary: Swan Coastal Plain是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Australian bustard，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This bustard will enter denser areas of vegetation after fire, and is observed on artificial cleared areas such as golf courses and farmland. The historical range in Southwest Australia included the dunes and alluvial flats of the Swan Coastal Plain, as far south as Busselton, and at the interior in what became the Wheatbelt
